personalAIAssistants.title: Personal AI Assistants
personalAIAssistants.description: Transform customer interactions with AI that understands context and individual needs.

learningUnderstanding.title: Learning & Understanding
learningUnderstanding.description: AI that continuously learns from interactions to understand user behavior and goals.

dataToKnowledge.title: Data to Knowledge
dataToKnowledge.description: Transform static data into living knowledge that continuously serves AI Agents.

HowItWorksSection.description: 93% of enterprises have experimented with AI, yet fewer than 12% have managed to scale it beyond isolated proof-of-concepts. The gap between a promising pilot and real enterprise value remains stubbornly wide.

fragmentedEcosystem.title: Fragmented AI Ecosystem
fragmentedEcosystem.description: AI tools operate separately without proper integration.

lackOfGovernance.title: Lack of AI Governance
lackOfGovernance.description: AI agents run without clear control, monitoring, or management.

deploymentBarriers.title: Production Deployment Barriers
deploymentBarriers.description: Security, compliance, and scaling issues slow real-world deployment.

instantTraining.title: Instant Training Data
instantTraining.description: Upload your datasets in seconds. Our edge network guarantees the data is instantly accessible for training, anywhere in the world.

unlimitedIntegration.title: Unlimited Integration
unlimitedIntegration.description: Seamlessly connect any tool, AI model, CRM, or ERP. Build intelligent applications with built‑in AI that automatically scale from inference to training.

realTimeCollab.title: Real-time Collaboration
realTimeCollab.description: Work together seamlessly. Live preview, instant feedback, and version control that actually makes sense.

enterpriseSecurity.title: Enterprise Security
enterpriseSecurity.description: Bank-grade encryption, SOC 2 compliance, and granular access controls. Your data stays yours.

CtaSection.description: Join thousands of teams shipping faster with Oriagent. Start free, scale infinitely.

nexus.quote: OriAgent turned our AI experiments into real production systems. We went from scattered tools to a unified AI infrastructure.

cloudbridge.quote: Managing AI agents across teams used to be chaos. OriAgent gave us governance, visibility, and full control.

dataforge.quote: Finally, a platform that lets enterprises scale AI safely. Security and compliance were built in from day one.

beacon.quote: OriAgent made AI automation reliable at scale. What used to break in production now runs continuously.

IntegrationsSection.description: Oriagent integrates securely with enterprise data sources to power scalable, production-ready AI agents.

FooterSection.description: The AI platform for teams who ship. Build, deploy, and scale with unprecedented velocity.
